title: Undefined calls to (abc9) prep_bypass
body:
## Steps to reproduce the issue

I use the symbiflow to synthesize a verilog design. I get an assertion error during the  second `synth_xilinx` command:
```
21.5.2. Executing ABC9_OPS pass (helper functions for ABC9).
map_design->addModuledesign->addModule
$paramod\FDPE\INIT=1'x_$abc9_byp
ERROR: Assert `modules_.count(name) == 0' failed in kernel/rtlil.cc:623.
make: *** [Makefile:23: build/Hydrogen1.eblif] Error 1
```
kernel/rtlil.cc:313 calls addModule() on the design class and can't add it, because it already exists. So I searched in the output and found my debugging prints also in the `PROC_CLEAN` step.

```
7.35.7.9. Executing PROC_CLEAN pass (remove empty switches from decision trees).$
11305 Removing empty process `$paramod$b4934def1af5f5fcc8b6ee124c5040d62fc2a45d\RAM64M.$proc$/opt/symbif      low/xc7/conda/envs/xc7/bin/../share/yosys/xilinx/cells_sim.v:1898$50554'.$
11306 Removing empty process `$paramod$b4934def1af5f5fcc8b6ee124c5040d62fc2a45d\RAM64M.$proc$/opt/symbif      low/xc7/conda/envs/xc7/bin/../share/yosys/xilinx/cells_sim.v:1897$50553'.$
11307 Removing empty process `$paramod$b4934def1af5f5fcc8b6ee124c5040d62fc2a45d\RAM64M.$proc$/opt/symbif      low/xc7/conda/envs/xc7/bin/../share/yosys/xilinx/cells_sim.v:1896$50552'.$
11308 Removing empty process `$paramod$b4934def1af5f5fcc8b6ee124c5040d62fc2a45d\RAM64M.$proc$/opt/symbif      low/xc7/conda/envs/xc7/bin/../share/yosys/xilinx/cells_sim.v:1895$50551'.$
11309 Found and cleaned up 1 empty switch in `$paramod$b4934def1af5f5fcc8b6ee124c5040d62fc2a45d\RAM64M.$      proc$/opt/symbiflow/xc7/conda/envs/xc7/bin/../share/yosys/xilinx/cells_sim.v:1904$50472'.$
11310 Removing empty process `$paramod$b4934def1af5f5fcc8b6ee124c5040d62fc2a45d\RAM64M.$proc$/opt/symbif      low/xc7/conda/envs/xc7/bin/../share/yosys/xilinx/cells_sim.v:1904$50472'.$
11311 Cleaned up 1 empty switch.$                                                     
11312 map_design->addModuledesign->addModule$                                         
11313 $paramod\FDCE\INIT=1'x_$abc9_byp$                                               
11314 unmap_design->addModule$                                                        
11315 map_design->addModuledesign->addModule$                                         
11316 $paramod\FDPE\INIT=1'x_$abc9_byp$    
```
Well, neither this tool nor another tools than abc9_ops.cc calls prep_bypass(). Therefore, I removed the call for this function in abc9_ops and got a "defined bot nut used warning" from gcc. Running the flow again, I get:
```
7.35.7.9. Executing PROC_CLEAN pass (remove empty switches from decision trees).
Removing empty process `$paramod$b4934def1af5f5fcc8b6ee124c5040d62fc2a45d\RAM64M.$proc$/opt/symbiflow/xc7/conda/envs/xc7/bin/../share/yosys/xilinx/cells_sim.v:1898$50554'.
Removing empty process `$paramod$b4934def1af5f5fcc8b6ee124c5040d62fc2a45d\RAM64M.$proc$/opt/symbiflow/xc7/conda/envs/xc7/bin/../share/yosys/xilinx/cells_sim.v:1897$50553'.
Removing empty process `$paramod$b4934def1af5f5fcc8b6ee124c5040d62fc2a45d\RAM64M.$proc$/opt/symbiflow/xc7/conda/envs/xc7/bin/../share/yosys/xilinx/cells_sim.v:1896$50552'.
Removing empty process `$paramod$b4934def1af5f5fcc8b6ee124c5040d62fc2a45d\RAM64M.$proc$/opt/symbiflow/xc7/conda/envs/xc7/bin/../share/yosys/xilinx/cells_sim.v:1895$50551'.
Found and cleaned up 1 empty switch in `$paramod$b4934def1af5f5fcc8b6ee124c5040d62fc2a45d\RAM64M.$proc$/opt/symbiflow/xc7/conda/envs/xc7/bin/../share/yosys/xilinx/cells_sim.v:1904$50472'.
Removing empty process `$paramod$b4934def1af5f5fcc8b6ee124c5040d62fc2a45d\RAM64M.$proc$/opt/symbiflow/xc7/conda/envs/xc7/bin/../share/yosys/xilinx/cells_sim.v:1904$50472'.
Cleaned up 1 empty switch.
ERROR: No saved design '$abc9_map' found!
make: *** [Makefile:23: build/Hydrogen1.eblif] Error 1
```
Seems like prep_bypass was still called from somewhere ...

I do not have much experience in debugging c++ code. Anyone suggestions?

BTW: The binary was built with master.

## Design file
[Hydrogen1.v.txt](https://github.com/YosysHQ/yosys/files/5961427/Hydrogen1.v.txt) (Remove the .txt at the end) 

## Complete stdout
[stdout.txt](https://github.com/YosysHQ/yosys/files/5961440/stdout.txt)

## tcl
[synth.tcl.txt](https://github.com/YosysHQ/yosys/files/5961446/synth.tcl.txt) (Remove the .txt at the end)
